label: Social Engineer / Physical Pentester
description: Conducts human-based security assessments — phishing simulations, vishing, physical intrusion testing, and OSINT-based pretexting evaluating organizational security awareness and physical controls.

paths.name: Social Engineering & Physical Track
paths.rationale: Thin formal certification market. TCM OSINT certs provide digital reconnaissance foundations; CESE from Social-Engineer LLC is the primary specialized SE credential.
pros: CESE is from Social-Engineer LLC — the most recognized SE training organization
TCM OSINT certs cover digital reconnaissance component of SE engagements
Niche specialization with strong demand from mature security programs
cons: Thin cert market — portfolio and demonstrated experience matters more
Physical pentesting has no widely recognized dedicated certification
Hiring decisions based on reputation more than cert count in this niche

prerequisites.experience: Strong communication skills are as important as technical skills. Prior security awareness or red team experience beneficial.

cert_sequence.notes: Foundation pentesting cert — establishes technical baseline. Report writing and engagement simulation directly relevant to SE work.

TCM Security OSINT and reconnaissance cert. OSINT methodology, target profiling, social media intelligence, and digital footprint analysis — the intelligence gathering phase that precedes every effective SE campaign.

Note: CESE (Certified Social Engineering Professional) from Social-Engineer LLC at social-engineer.com is the primary goal cert for this specialization. Research current availability directly. After certification build experience through red team engagements, phishing simulation programs, and documented SE assessments — portfolio matters more than cert count.
